message:
feat(runtime): add debug tracing and enhance terminal writer

New debug_trace.rs module for runtime debugging:
- Trace event logging with timestamps
- Performance metrics collection
- State transition tracking

Terminal writer improvements:
- Add buffered write optimizations
- Improve flush timing for smoother output

Also update lib.rs exports, program.rs integration,
and subscription.rs with debug events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
